Container.Name: alldebrid-client
Container.Overview:
<<<<<<< HEAD [b]AllDebrid-Client v0.6.3[/b] Leaves destination directory creation entirely to aria2 when aria2 is the active download client, while keeping the recent watch-folder and AllDebrid stability fixes. ======= [b]AllDebrid-Client v1.0.0[/b] >>>>>>> 5794aeb134b4c2391dba583da78847a0b1460987
Self-hosted torrent automation via AllDebrid — Web UI, aria2 delivery, Discord notifications, PostgreSQL support, FlexGet integration.
[b]Features:[/b] • Full torrent lifecycle: upload → poll → unlock → aria2 → done → Discord • Watch folder — drop .torrent or .magnet files for auto-import • Slot-based aria2 queue with configurable concurrent download limit • Discord rich embeds for add / complete / error events • FlexGet v3 integration (schedule + manual trigger) • SQLite (default) or PostgreSQL (external) • Sonarr / Radarr import trigger • File filters — block by extension, keyword, minimum size • Automatic no-peer cleanup and stuck-download detection
[b]Quick Setup:[/b] 1. Set paths for Config, Watch, Processed, Downloads 2. Open http://[IP]:8080 → Settings → enter AllDebrid API key → Save 3. Configure aria2 RPC URL in Settings → Download 4. Add magnets via UI or drop files in Watch folder
[b]Network:[/b] Uses host network mode to avoid conflicts with Unraid shares (shfs).

Config.Name: Data folder
Config.Description: Stores the SQLite database and backups.

Config.Name: Watch folder
Config.Description: Drop .torrent or .magnet files here for automatic import.

Config.Name: Processed folder
Config.Description: Torrent/magnet files are moved here after processing.

Config.Name: Download folder
Config.Description: Downloaded files land here (aria2 writes to this path).

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone. Examples: Europe/Berlin, UTC, America/New_York

Config.Name: Log level
Config.Description: INFO for normal use, DEBUG for troubleshooting.

Config.Name: DB type
Config.Description: Leave empty for SQLite (default). Set to 'postgres' for external PostgreSQL.

Config.Name: Config path
Config.Description: Internal config path — do not change.

Config.Name: DB path
Config.Description: Internal SQLite DB path — do not change.
